title: Mercedes India VP Legal Shweta Pandey joins Wells Fargo as Head of Legal
description: Shweta Pandey has joined Well Fargo as the Head of Legal, India & the Philippines.Pandey is a 2007 alumna of NALSAR University of Law, Hyderabad.With nearly two decades of experience, Pandey started her career at the erstwhile Amarchand Mangaldas, before switching to in-house roles. A seasoned corporate-commercial and transactional lawyer, she has held legal leadership roles across multiple leading organisations such as IBM India, Infosys and Target India.Prior to joining Wells Fargo, Pandey
